tweets.content: And that’s just the tip of the iceberg
RT by @cz_binance: on June 30th 2020, $BNB was trading at $15,49. 6 years ago precisely. definition of « building » in numbers.

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: Binance Japan は7月1日付で、豊崎亜里紗 @arisatoyo_jp が新ゼネラルマネージャー（代表取締役）に就任いたします。Binance Japanの次なる成長フェーズへ。 全文はこちら👇 https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000050.000126862.html #BinanceJapan #Web3 #暗号資産
tweets.translated: @cz_binance 转发：Arisa Toyosaki @arisatoyo_jp 将于 7 月 1 日被任命为币安日本的新总经理（代表董事）。迈向币安日本的下一个增长阶段。点击此处查看全文👇 https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000050.000126862.html #BinanceJapan #Web3 #Cryptoassets

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: $SIVE is raising ~$61M (600M SEK) to expand manufacturing capacity for InP lasers and optical amplifiers. Sivers operates as a fab-lite model so this is likely hinting at foundry allocation/scaling for CW DFB laser ramp across Jabil, and their other partners. It could also point to broader foundry allocation/scaling beyond the already announced WIN partnership. My feedback is that it's very bullish if it's comprised of long-only institutions and there's no heavy discount (30 day VWAP). Otherwise, would need to reaccess if there's arb or short term investors. This is the perfect time to get ideal strategic investors like $GFS on the cap table. As well as focusing on having more US institutional support. Especially considering $56M is a small check to a single US institution that want photonics exposure (eg. look at Poet's $400M registered direct offering for sentiment). A lot of it is "it depends when more info comes out", but this looks like a very positive signal for mass production given Siver's fab-lite models.
tweets.translated: $SIVE 正在筹集约 6100 万美元（6 亿瑞典克朗），用于扩大 InP 激光器和光学放大器的制造能力。 Sivers 以精简晶圆厂模式运营，因此这可能暗示捷普及其其他合作伙伴的 CW DFB 激光坡道代工厂分配/规模扩大。它还可能表明，除了已经宣布的 WIN 合作伙伴关系之外，还有更广泛的代工分配/规模扩大。我的反馈是，如果它由只做多的机构组成并且没有大幅折扣（30 天 VWAP），那么它是非常看涨的。否则，如果有套利或短期投资者，则需要重新进入。现在是让像 $GFS 这样的理想战略投资者进入股权结构表的最佳时机。并注重获得更多美国机构的支持。特别是考虑到 5600 万美元对于一家希望涉足光子学领域的美国机构来说只是一笔小额支票（例如，看看 Poet 的 4 亿美元注册直接发行以表达情绪）。其中很多是“这取决于更多信息何时出现”，但考虑到 Siver 的 fab-lite 模型，这对于大规模生产来说似乎是一个非常积极的信号。

tweets.content: Yep! Agility Robotics is currently my favorite humanoid/robotics position. They're set to be listed on NASDAQ via $CCXI as early as September (per Digitimes). Just for informational purposes: Their V4 humanoid robot is already operating in sites like Amazon. And have V5 slated for mass production next year (they have a 10,000+ /year capacity). Investors include Foxconn, $NVDA, $AMZN, Softbank, and now Serenity. I've been personally waiting for humanoid exposure for awhile (Agility is set to be the first US pure-play listed one) to the point I was actually planning on investing in Unitree's IPO. But I'm glad now I personally have a compelling alternative now since I prefer to invest capital to build up Made in America supply chains (75% of their components are US-sourced from investor desks). There are risks assigned to SPACs such as listing delays, or cancellation. But excited to see what happens next with developments. I do hope this encourages other frontier companies to go public early on.
tweets.translated: 是的！敏捷机器人是目前我最喜欢的人形/机器人职位。他们最早将于 9 月通过 $CCXI 在纳斯达克上市（据 Digitimes 报道）。仅供参考：他们的 V4 人形机器人已经在亚马逊等网站上运行。 V5 预计明年量产（年产能超过 10,000 辆）。投资者包括富士康、$NVDA、$AMZN、软银以及现在的 Serenity。我个人等待人形机器人的曝光已经有一段时间了（Agility 将成为第一个在美国上市的纯游戏），以至于我实际上计划投资 Unitree 的 IPO。但我很高兴现在我个人有了一个令人信服的选择，因为我更愿意投资资金来建立美国制造的供应链（其 75％ 的组件是从投资者柜台采购的美国）。 SPAC 存在上市延迟或取消等风险。但很高兴看到接下来会发生什么。我确实希望这能鼓励其他前沿公司尽早上市。

tweets.content: I wonder if humanoids is going to spark a new bottleneck/industry for robot cosmetics. Like a skin bottleneck. Or Aespa KPOP robot makeover as a service. So if $TSLA Optimus makes tens of millions of humanoids: Who’s going to make them all look hot?
tweets.translated: 我想知道类人机器人是否会引发机器人化妆品的新瓶颈/行业。就像皮肤瓶颈一样。或者 Aespa KPOP 机器人改造服务。因此，如果 TSLA Optimus 制造了数千万个类人机器人：谁会让它们看起来很性感？
